title: Creeper Overhaul x Fresh Animations
description: A Fresh Animations addon for the Creeper Overhaul RP
body:
**![](blob:https://imgur.com/3063a971-4efa-4852-8b64-0bc41e6b2897)![](https://i.imgur.com/KGzi90W.png)**  

**![](https://i.imgur.com/52LU4mv.png)**

**DISCLAIMER: This is an addon for the Creeper Overhaul Resourcepack not the Mod!** 

 

A [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) Addon for the [Creeper Overhaul Resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-overhaul-rp) 

**\-Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) + [Creeper Overhaul RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-overhaul-rp) -**

 

[**![](https://i.imgur.com/jJoDs5r.png)**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-overhaul-rp)

  

****Use This Pack Order:****

 

**![](https://i.imgur.com/wt0XlhF.png)**

  **![](https://i.imgur.com/mnnbI3S.png)**

 

 GogoMines - Creating the resource pack

FreshLX - Creating Fresh Animations

Joosh - Creeper Overhaul

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZtjUq8p.png)

 

[**Better Mob Models**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-mob-models) \- A Resource Pack that overhauls vanilla mob models and textures in joosh´s artstyle

[Creeper Overhaul RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-overhaul-rp) - A resource pack that brings the Creeper Overhaul creepers into vanilla Minecraft!

[ ](https://discord.gg/sGwxnFV)[![](https://i.imgur.com/T4ltmGW.png)](https://discord.gg/sGwxnFV)    [![](https://i.imgur.com/ewzK3Zb.png)](https://twitter.com/Joosh7889)    [![](https://i.imgur.com/EirVdtZ.png)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCUvb1-kBGDEA1gVtd3UhlLg/videos)    [![](https://i.imgur.com/AEfwGvx.png)](https://ko-fi.com/bonsaistudios)    [![](https://i.imgur.com/DErXjx6.png)](https://mcmodels.net/vendors/29/joosh)
